title: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Nucor Corporation (NUE) is a Trending Stock
text: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Nucor (NUE) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

title: This Dividend King Sees Huge Demand Growth On the Horizon
text: Steel is a highly cyclical industry, which historically tracks closely with economic activity. Nucor doesn't expect the nature of the industry to fundamentally change, but it believes there are material tailwinds ahead.

title: Nucor: Between Cyclical Headwinds And Secular Tailwinds
text: Nucor Corp. has shown resilience in the steel industry despite challenges faced by steel stocks, benefiting from secular tailwinds, such as the CHIPS Act and strong demand for high-value-added steel products in nonresidential construction. The company delivered strong financial performance in Q1, with increased volumes and margins contributing to profitability, and maintains a strong balance sheet and commitment to shareholder returns through share repurchases and consistent dividends.

title: Nucor (NUE) Steel Longview Plate Mill to Cease Production
text: Nucor Corporation NUE has announced that it will reorganize its plate group, including the closure of production at Nucor Steel Longview, LLC. All Nucor Steel Longview teammates will be offered jobs at other Nucor divisions.

title: Markets Fall as Debt Ceiling Agreement Talks Drag on
text: U.S. equities lost ground on May 23, 2023 as White House and congressional negotiators still haven't reached a deal on raising the federal debt ceiling to avoid a potential government default.

title: The Street is Downbeat on Steel. The Case Against Nucor, Others.
text: J.P. Morgan analyst Bill Peterson launched coverage of the five steel producers. He doesn't really like any of them.

title: Is Trending Stock Nucor Corporation (NUE) a Buy Now?
text: Nucor (NUE) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

title: NuScale Power and Nucor Corporation Sign Memorandum of Understanding to Explore Deployment of Small Modular Nuclear Reactors to Power Nucor Electric Arc Furnace Steel Mills
text: PORTLAND, Ore.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--This MOU will explore co-locating NuScale's VOYGR™ SMR power plants to provide electricity to Nucor's scrap-based electric arc furnace steel mills.
